title: Create Horse Armor
description: A retexture of vanilla horse armor to fit Create aesthetic.
body:
This resource pack changes the textures of the vanilla horse armor to fit the Create aesthetic; Iron to Zinc, Golden to Copper, Diamond to Brass. All armors have their corresponding item textures as well as a changed name (en_us).

**Optifine or any of its alternatives are not required!**

Create isn't required, but highly recommended. That's what the pack was made for.
